opinion.h1: 386 U.S. 481"> SHANNON v. SEQUEECHI, SHERIFF, ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES COURT OF APPEALS FOR THE TENTH CIRCUIT. No. 1198, Misc. Decided March 27, 1967.
opinion.p: 365 F.2d 827, appeal dismissed and certiorari denied.
The appeal is dismissed for want of jurisdiction. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for a writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
